lines.speaker: Shantay Guard
lines.text: Go talk to Shantay. I'm on duty and I don't have time to talk to the likes of you!

sections.title: Standard dialogue - Guard at the gate

lines.speaker: Shantay Guard
lines.text: Hello there! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to go into the desert please.

lines.speaker: Shantay Guard
lines.text: You'll need a Shantay pass to go through the gate into the desert. See Shantay, he'll sell you one for a very reasonable price.

lines.speaker: Shantay Guard
lines.text: Okay then, have a nice day.
